title: Tokyo Ghoul - Fabric
description: This pack brings the dark and captivating world of Tokyo Ghoul to Minecraft, with completely reworked animated hotbar graphics and a unique aesthetic that fans of the series will love.
body:
I'm super excited to introduce you to my brand new texture pack: Tokyo Ghoul! @znygames ### рҹҺһ| TRAILER ### рҹ–ј| EXAMPLE HOTBAR ![hotbar animated](https://i.imgur.com/ry0aSlr.gif) ![hotbar_01](https://i.imgur.com/X8GVEPa.png) ![hotbar_02](https://i.imgur.com/5ZzykkO.png) ### рҹ—’| DESCRIPTION This pack brings the dark and captivating world of Tokyo Ghoul to Minecraft, with completely reworked animated hotbar graphics and a unique aesthetic that fans of the series will love. You can use this pack in the standard Vanilla version and with Fabric. If you're a Tokyo Ghoul fan, I hope you'll enjoy this pack as much as I enjoyed creating it. Your feedback is always welcome, and if you like the pack, I would greatly appreciate a subscription! New! with this pack: - The pack is playable with Fabric Loader versions 0.15.11 - 1.21. - animated hotbarвҖғ ### рҹӣҲ |INSTALL Note: If you encounter any issues, make sure that the texture pack is compatible with your version of Minecraft, and that you have followed all of the steps correctly.
Install FABRIC - The latest Fabric Launcher is required for the Minecraft Fabric mod. Fabric Loader 0.15.11-1.21 - Update your Java. At least java 21 Java Oracle
### рҹ’¬| COMMUNITY (гҒЈпјҫв–ҝпјҫ)Ы¶рҹҚёрҹҢҹрҹҚәЩ©(Лҳв—ЎЛҳ ) Hey, We invite you to join our Discord community where you can connect with fellow players, share your ideas, and report any bugs you encounter. Whether you have suggestions for improving the hotbar or need support with any issues, our community is here to help. LetвҖҷs build, explore, and create together! ### рҹ”—|BEDROCK VERSION ### рҹ’–| THX! See you in the next pack!
